languages.text: "Опирается при ходьбе на посох. Ведет себя гораздо разумнее, чем прочие чужаки. Чрезвычайно разговорчив и высокомерен. Все эти признаки нетипичны для некронов, поэтому я присвоил ему наивысшую степень опасности".

"He leans on his staff to walk. He behaves far more intelligently than other xenos. He is talkative and conceited. None of this is typical of Necrons, which is why I see him as a threat of the highest order."
languages.original_text: "Опирается при ходьбе на посох. Ведет себя гораздо разумнее, чем прочие чужаки. Чрезвычайно разговорчив и высокомерен. Все эти признаки нетипичны для некронов, поэтому я присвоил ему наивысшую степень опасности".

traits.locale_text: "He leans on his staff to walk. He behaves far more intelligently than other xenos. He is talkative and conceited. None of this is typical of Necrons, which is why I see him as a threat of the highest order."

"He leans on his staff to walk. He behaves far more intelligently than other xenos. He is talkative and conceited. None of this is typical of Necrons, which is why I see him as a threat of the highest order."

"He behaves far more intelligently than other inhumans. His distinguishing feature is an unusual weapon that he wields with skill. I am not sure exactly how that staff works, but the one blow it delivered severely wounded me and killed two others in the same instant."

"He leans on his staff to walk. He behaves far more intelligently than other xenos. He is talkative and conceited. None of this is typical of Necrons, which is why I see him as a threat of the highest order."

"He leans on his staff to walk. He behaves far more intelligently than other xenos. He is talkative and conceited. None of this is typical of Necrons, which is why I see him as a threat of the highest order."

languages.text: 「彼は他の異種族よりもはるかに賢く振る舞う。彼の特徴は、巧みに操る珍しい武器である。その杖の働き方はよくわからないが、一撃で重傷を負い、同時に2人の仲間が死亡した」
languages.original_text: "He behaves far more intelligently than other inhumans. His distinguishing feature is an unusual weapon that he wields with skill. I am not sure exactly how that staff works, but the one blow it delivered severely wounded me and killed two others in the same instant."

traits.locale_text: 「彼は他の異種族よりもはるかに賢く振る舞う。彼の特徴は、巧みに操る珍しい武器である。その杖の働き方はよくわからないが、一撃で重傷を負い、同時に2人の仲間が死亡した。」

languages.text: «Se apoya en un bastón para andar. Se comporta de forma más inteligente que otros xenos. Es parlanchín y engreído. Nada de eso es típico de los Necrones, lo que me lleva a considerarlo una amenaza de máxima categoría».
languages.original_text: "He leans on his staff to walk. He behaves far more intelligently than other xenos. He is talkative and conceited. None of this is typical of Necrons, which is why I see him as a threat of the highest order."

traits.locale_text: «Se apoya en un bastón para andar. Se comporta de forma más inteligente que otros xenos. Es parlanchín y engreído. Nada de eso es típico de los Necrones, lo que me lleva a considerarlo una amenaza de máxima categoría».

languages.text: "Er lehnt sich auf seinen Gehstock. Er verhält sich deutlich intelligenter als andere Xenos. Er ist gesprächig und selbstgefällig. Nichts davon ist typisch für einen Necron, deshalb betrachte ich ihn als große Gefahr."
languages.original_text: "He leans on his staff to walk. He behaves far more intelligently than other xenos. He is talkative and conceited. None of this is typical of Necrons, which is why I see him as a threat of the highest order."

traits.locale_text: "Er lehnt sich auf seinen Gehstock. Er verhält sich deutlich intelligenter als andere Xenos. Er ist gesprächig und selbstgefällig. Nichts davon ist typisch für einen Necron, deshalb betrachte ich ihn als große Gefahr."

languages.text: « Il se sert de son bâton pour se déplacer. Il semble bien plus intelligent que les autres xénos. Il est aussi bavard que vaniteux. Tout ceci est inhabituel pour un Nécron et c'est pour cela que j'estime qu'il représente une menace de premier ordre. »
languages.original_text: "He leans on his staff to walk. He behaves far more intelligently than other xenos. He is talkative and conceited. None of this is typical of Necrons, which is why I see him as a threat of the highest order."

traits.locale_text: « Il se sert de son bâton pour se déplacer. Il semble bien plus intelligent que les autres xénos. Il est aussi bavard que vaniteux. Tout ceci est inhabituel pour un Nécron et c'est pour cela que j'estime qu'il représente une menace de premier ordre. »

languages.text: “他行走时要依靠权杖，而且比其他异形聪明得多。他话多、自负。这些都不是太空死灵的典型做派，正因如此，我认为他是极度危险的威胁。”
languages.original_text: "He leans on his staff to walk. He behaves far more intelligently than other xenos. He is talkative and conceited. None of this is typical of Necrons, which is why I see him as a threat of the highest order."

traits.locale_text: “他行走时要依靠权杖，而且比其他异形聪明得多。他话多、自负。这些都不是太空死灵的典型做派，正因如此，我认为他是极度危险的威胁。”

languages.text: "Yürümek için asasına yaslanıyor. Diğer zenolara göre çok daha zekice davranıyor. Konuşkan ve kendini beğenmiş. Bunların hiçbiri Nekronlara özgü değil, bu yüzden onu en üst düzey tehdit olarak görüyorum."
languages.original_text: "He leans on his staff to walk. He behaves far more intelligently than other xenos. He is talkative and conceited. None of this is typical of Necrons, which is why I see him as a threat of the highest order."

traits.locale_text: "Yürümek için asasına yaslanıyor. Diğer zenolara göre çok daha zekice davranıyor. Konuşkan ve kendini beğenmiş. Bunların hiçbiri Nekronlara özgü değil, bu yüzden onu en üst düzey tehdit olarak görüyorum."
